id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

method.description: A string containing the method name to be invoked.

params.description: A structure that holds the parameter values.

devtype.description: devtype of an endpoint. such as FortiGate, FortiClient, FortiMail, FortiWeb, FortiSandbox, FortiDDos, iPad, PC and etc.

id.description: identifier of an endpoint.

type.description: type of identifier of an endpoint.

value.description: value of identifier of an endpoint.

nic.description: network interface card data of an endpoint.

session.description: The cookie of an active session in FortiAnalyzer.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

result.description: A structured value responding to add method.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

method.description: A string containing the method name to be invoked.

params.description: A structure that holds the parameter values.

detail-level.description: The level of details to get.

limit.description: The maximun number of records to get.

offset.description: The offset of records to get.

field.description: Sortable field. Standard detail-level supports fields: epid, epname, mac, epip, fctuid, osname, detecttype, firstseen, lastseen

time-range.description: Time range for endpoints. (required if the epids field is not provided)

end.description: Ending date time. Consider it following the timezone parameter's, ADOM's or FortiAnalyzer's timezone if timezone info is not specified within time range. Format: 'yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssZ' (RFC 3339) e.g. '2016-10-17T20:45:37-07:00 or 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' e.g. '2016-10-17 20:45:37'

start.description: Starting date time. Consider it following the timezone parameter's, ADOM's or FortiAnalyzer's timezone if timezone info is not specified within time range. Format: 'yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssZ' (RFC 3339) e.g. '2016-10-17T20:45:37-07:00 or 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' e.g. '2016-10-17 20:45:37'

session.description: The cookie of an active session in FortiAnalyzer.

id.description: An identifier established by the client.

jsonrpc.description: A string specifying the JSON-RPC protocol version.

result.description: A structured value responding to get method.

data.description: A structured value of dataset. (When detail-level is Standard)

attrupdate.description: Infomation related to the last update.

devtype.description: The log device of the last associated log.

lastupdate.description: The timestamp of the last update in the Format of 'YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss'.

logtype.description: The log type of the last associated log.

loguid.description: The log id of the last associated log.

detecttype.description: The method of detecting an endpoint.

firstseen.description: The timestamp of the initial endpoint detection. Format: yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss

iot-vuln-stats.description: IoT vulnerabilities (vulnerabilities detected by FortiGate) statistics.

cnt_cri.description: Number of critial severity IoT vulnerabilities.

cnt_hig.description: Number of high severity IoT vulnerabilities.

cnt_low.description: Number of low severity IoT vulnerabilities.

cnt_med.description: Number of medium severity IoT vulnerabilities.

cnt_unk.description: Number of unknown severity IoT vulnerabilities.

lastseen.description: The timestamp of the last endpoint detection. Format: yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss

source.description: The source(s) of detecting an endpoint

items.description: One source of detecting an endpoint. Format: <device name>/<interface>
One user detected on the endpoint

lastseen.description: The epoch timestamp of last seeing the enduser.

total-endpoints.description: The total number of endpoints that qualifies the search criteria.

info.description:
Documentation for FortiAnalyzer JSON API

This daemon controls main system functions, including log in and log out. All APIs for this module are under the prefix /sys/.
info.title: FortiAnalyzer JSON API Documentation

post.description: Request FGT to send the latest epeu data through oftp immediately.
Get the OT-view asset information and relation.
